fix this and do comprehensive playwright tests. test every button/feature


add a task and make it top priority to comprehensively test the codebase using playwright with a persistent single tab on a single browser. I want to open up every page, click every button, use every feature. Write down in the task that if there are any errors in the testing, new tasks should be made with higher priority to fix it. The main and only focus from here on out should be the puppeteer tests. Write down in the task that only absolute completion perfection is accepted.

MAKE SURE TO CAPTURE ALL CONSOLE LOGS. MAKE SURE TO ANALYZE SCREENSHOTS AND MAKE SURE EACH PAGE/POPUP LOOKS PROFESSIONAL, SLICK, AND MODERN.

For each test, make sure to take multiple screenshots and the console logs before and after actions, as often as you can, to test every page, every button, every feature, and to make sure they all work. 

Have pauses between pages and buttons clicks and transitions. make it like a user as much as possible

Playwright tests may already exist. Try to use those if they do exist. do not create new ones if old ones already exist

ONLY PERFECTION IS ACCEPTED. Things must work, must look good and professional, and have a unified color scheme. You must analyze the important screenshots and any screenshots related to errors. 

if a COMPREHENSIVE_FRONTEND_LAYOUT.md file doesn't already exist in the reports directory, have a research task to make it. It should cover all pages, buttons, features, expectations, so you know exactly what to do for your playwright tests

use the playwright mcp server for this
